description_long: This mushroom features a large, rounded cap with a smooth, glossy surface that transitions from deep blue to lighter cyan highlights, giving it a slightly iridescent appearance. The cap is adorned with several shallow, dark grooves or striations, primarily concentrated on one side, adding a sense of texture and depth. The stem is thick, short, and tapers slightly toward the base, colored in a muted beige or off-white tone. The underside of the cap and the gills are not visible in any view, suggesting the cap overhangs the stem significantly. The overall form is stylized and robust, with the cap dominating the visual mass of the object. This mushroom would stand out in an urban park or landscaped area due to its striking coloration and smooth, almost artificial finish.
description: A large, blue-cyan mushroom with a glossy, striated cap and a thick beige stem. The cap is smooth and rounded, with dark grooves adding texture.
description_view_0: The cap appears smooth and rounded with a prominent highlight and visible striations on the left side; the thick stem is centered and beige.
description_view_1: The cap is viewed more from the back, showing multiple dark grooves and a more pronounced curvature; the stem is partially visible with more shadow.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the cap is rounded and glossy with striations on the left; the stem is fully visible and centered.
description_view_3: The cap is seen from the opposite side, with striations more central and a large highlight on the left; the stem is visible and slightly shadowed.
